features.name: Northwind CRUD Demo
features.description: An interactive app demonstrating the Cruddy CRUD framework with the classic Northwind relational dataset (customers, orders, products). Registered in the Dev browse path as the primary entry-point demo.
features.evidence_summary: northwindDemo is the only function with a browsePath ('Dev') and the readme describes the Cruddy framework through this dataset, making them the natural primary demo cluster.

features.name: ChEMBL CRUD Demo
features.description: An app demonstrating the Cruddy CRUD framework applied to ChEMBL chemical/bioactivity data, showing entity browsing and editing for chemistry-domain datasets.
features.evidence_summary: chemblDemo is a self-contained CRUD demo targeting ChEMBL data, distinguished from the Northwind demo by dataset domain and the absence of a registered browsePath.
